race.comment: FIRE TYPE (2) peaks and is well placed off a 1.75 length defeat over 1600m at Colac. Disappointed as a $2.5 favourite over 1600m at Pakenham prior, where he was unsuited leading. Has been kept on the fresh side, and the inside barrier should be an advantage. HURCO (3) pulled up with an issue two back and then was slow off over 1312m at Geelong and always had the job ahead. Draws low today and the step up to 1600m is sure to suit. Has more ability than the form line suggests. LADY COLONIST (10) jumped $2.9 at Terang and tired over the latter stages. Come back 250m for this and the in-form Meech rides for the first time. She's likely to push forward, and the filly can't be ruled out.EVASIVE RULER (1) did about what was expected at Sawn Hill on debut. Keeps John Allen and showed enough to keep onside over the longer journey..
